diagrams.title: Technical Architecture Layers
diagrams.description: Shows the three-layer structure of data warehouse technical architecture from bottom to top
elements: Bottom Layer: Hardware (Servers, Storage, Network) and Operating System
Middle Layer: Database Software (DBMS, Query Optimizer, Storage Engine)
Top Layer: Collection of Tools (ETL Tools, BI/Reporting Tools, Metadata Tools)
Arrows showing data flow upward through layers
Metadata Repository spanning across all layers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how technical components are organized hierarchically and how they interact to support data warehouse functionality
